AWS Terraform Multi-Agent Workflow

Production-grade infrastructure automation with mandatory human approval

Status: Idle
New Infrastructure Request

This workflow includes a mandatory human approval gate before any infrastructure is deployed. All changes are validated for security and cost before requiring your explicit authorization.

Pipeline: 6 stages

Agent Pipeline
1
Planneridle

Converts natural language to structured infrastructure plan

2
Generatoridle

Produces validated Terraform HCL

3
Validatoridle

Runs syntax, security, and policy checks

4
Cost Estimatoridle

Calculates AWS infrastructure costs

5
Human Approvalidle

Mandatory authorization gate

6
Deployeridle

Executes terraform apply

Infrastructure Plan

Waiting for Planner agent...

Validation Report

Waiting for Validator agent...

Cost Estimate

Waiting for Cost Estimator agent...

Start a workflow to see results here
